2014 meng in industrial engineering - etsii, technical university of madrid (upm) y mechanical specialty. additional training course of lean methodology given in tetra pak. course of iso 9001, iso 14001 and brc. course of "development of an engineering project" given by fluor in etsii. machining seminar given by sandvik in etsii. work experience e sep 2013 - jan 2014 internship in department of mechanical engineering at etsii (upm), working in several projects in collaboration with abengoa, such as: v project of a solar photovoltaic concentrator. design and manufacture of a salt spray test chamber, and subsequent corrosion analysis. v design of a pneumatic assembly system. collaboration in a project of wind turbines. e sep 2014 - sep 2015 process engineer at tetra pak. v performance of duties related to process improvement and production control, focused in efficiency and waste. y knowledge of world class manufacturing, specialised in focused improvement, pillar of tpm. y development and implementation of lean project through the value stream mapping. y knowledge of kaizen, 4m's, 5w+h and lean manufacturing. y knowledge of spc and collaboration in iso and brc audits. e oct 2015 - present technology consulting analyst at accenture. languages e spanish : native. e french : basic-medium level. e english : high level. e german : basic. computer - software e advanced knowledge of design and calculation programmes: solid edge, catia, nx nastran, autocad y simulation moldflow. e advanced knowledge of ms office: excel, word, power point, outlook, project y access. e advanced knowledge of matlab, winunisoft y festo fluidsim.
